hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(cat /dev/stdin | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; for pat in "settings.php" "settings.ddev.php"; do [[ "$FILE" == *"$pat" ]] && echo "BLOCKED: $pat is a protected file. Remove it from protected_files in drupal-claude.yml if you need to edit it." && exit 1; done; [[ "$FILE" == *.install ]] && echo "BLOCKED: .install files require explicit approval." && exit 1; [[ "$FILE" == *config_split.config_split.* ]] && echo "BLOCKED: config split files require explicit approval." && exit 1; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(cat /dev/stdin | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(php|module|install|inc|theme|test)$ ]] && php -l "$FILE" 2>&1 | tail -3 || true'
